params.name: Astronaut Cap
params.description: This Astronaut Cap belonged to an alien race. Unlike Earthlings, this race lives on helium gas, so when they reach Earth, they need to wear a full protective suit. In particular, the hat on their head, which has a fully functional rebreather to ensure their survival outside the spacecraft.
